title: Fiery Spicy Italian Pork Saltimbocca
description: A spicy and energizing Italian dish featuring grapefruit juice and coconut cream, this saltimbocca is a low-calorie twist on a classic recipe, with a shaggy and vibrant presentation that is sure to delight, made with pork and infused with fiery spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the pork cutlets with salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add the prosciutto, cooking until crispy.
Remove the prosciutto from the skillet and set aside, leaving the grease behind.
Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the pork cutlets to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until browned.
Transfer the pork cutlets to a baking dish and top each cutlet with a slice of prosciutto, a sprinkle of sage, and a spoonful of coconut cream.
Drizzle the grapefruit juice over the top of the pork cutlets and bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, until cooked through.
Remove the pork cutlets from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
